ios.prebuildCommand: npx expo prebuild --non-interactive --platform ios && printf 'export NODE_BINARY=$(command -v node)\n' > ios/.xcode.env && printf 'export NODE_BINARY=$(command -v node)\n' > ios/.xcode.env.local
